summary: Comprehensive testing of Procurement module (P2P automation). All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including login flows, tab navigation, notification bell, and export buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: All procurement endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field
Role-based access control working correctly for CA and Directors
Approval workflow with threshold-based approver assignment working
OCR imports have proper fallback handling when libraries unavailable
Notification bell dropdown working with unread count
All export formats (CSV, Excel, PDF) working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test quotations and POs created via API tests with TEST_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Procurement module fully tested. Test sessions created for CA and Director users. Test data includes quotations with TEST_ prefix. Approval workflow tested with PO creation and director approval. Use test_session_ca_procurement and test_session_director_procurement for authenticated requests.
